title: Viewer pages should avoid duplicate controls
summary: Viewer UX should avoid duplicate controls and alias pages. The graph quickbar and hidden workspace tabs were removed because Graph already has a normal controls panel. Memory now renders a memory library, Owners renders
body: Viewer UX should avoid duplicate controls and alias pages. The graph quickbar and hidden workspace tabs were removed because Graph already has a normal controls panel. Memory now renders a memory library, Owners renders contributor/ownership cards, Intel renders repo intelligence reports, Review renders inbox/proof, and Data renders raw nodes/edges.

context.fact: Viewer UX should avoid duplicate controls and alias pages. The graph quickbar and hidden workspace tabs were removed because Graph already has a normal controls panel. Memory now renders a memory library, Owners renders contributor/ownership cards, Intel renders repo intelligence reports, Review renders inbox/proof, and Data renders raw nodes/edges.
